string.name: booking_guide
string.string:
1. Select a Venue
Select a venue from the venues screen.

2. Book the Venue
Click "Book Now".

3. Enter Event Details
Enter valid event details.

4. Wait for Confirmation
Wait for confirmation from the custodian whether your booking is approved or cancelled.

Need Help?
For concerns or inquiries, contact us through our email: wildcatsden-support@gmail.com
